content.problemStatement:
Let f(X,Y)=‚ĆąX+YX‚ą£Y‚ĆČf(X, Y) = \left \lceil \dfrac{X + Y}{X | Y} \right \rceilf(X,Y)=‚ĆąX‚ą£YX+Y‚Äč‚ĆČ, i.e. the result of X+YX + YX+Y divided by X‚ą£YX | YX‚ą£Y rounded up, where ‚ą£|‚ą£ denotes the Bitwise OR symbol.

You are given an array AAA of length NNN.

Your task is to compute ‚ąĎi=1N‚ąĎj=i+1Nf(Ai,Aj)\sum_{i = 1}^{N} \sum_{j = i + 1}^{N} f(A_i, A_j)‚ąĎi=1N‚Äč‚ąĎj=i+1N‚Äčf(Ai‚Äč,Aj‚Äč), i.e. the sum of fff over all pairs in the array AAA.

**Note** : There is an additional constraint on the input that every number has at most **444 bits set** in their binary representation, i.e. it is possible to write Ai=2X1+2X2+...+2XLA_i = 2^{X_1} + 2^{X_2} + ... + 2^{X_L}Ai‚Äč=2X1‚Äč+2X2‚Äč+...+2XL‚Äč with L‚Č§4L \le 4L‚Č§4 and XiX_iXi‚Äč are all non-negative integers.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line contains NNN - the size of the array.
The second line contains NNN integers - A1,A2,....,ANA_1, A_2, ...., A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,....,AN‚Äč.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the value of ‚ąĎi=1N‚ąĎj=i+1Nf(Ai,Aj)\sum_{i = 1}^{N} \sum_{j = i + 1}^{N} f(A_i, A_j)‚ąĎi=1N‚Äč‚ąĎj=i+1N‚Äčf(Ai‚Äč,Aj‚Äč).
constraints: AiA_iAi‚Äč can be written as 2X1+2X2+....+2XL2^{X_1} + 2^{X_2} + .... + 2^{X_L}2X1‚Äč+2X2‚Äč+....+2XL‚Äč with L‚Č§4L \le 4L‚Č§4 and XiX_iXi‚Äč non-negative integers.
The sum of NNN does not exceed 2‚čÖ1052 \cdot 10^52‚čÖ105 over all test cases.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1 : There is only one pair in the array i=1,j=2i = 1, j = 2i=1,j=2. So, we need to evaluate f(1,2)=‚Ćą33‚ĆČ=1f(1, 2) = \lceil \frac{3}{3} \rceil = 1f(1,2)=‚Ćą33‚Äč‚ĆČ=1, as 1+2=1‚ą£2=11 + 2 = 1 | 2 = 11+2=1‚ą£2=1.
Test Case 2 : It can be shown that f(1,1)=2f(1, 1) = 2f(1,1)=2, and there are 333 such pairs. Hence, the answer is 3‚čÖ2=63 \cdot 2 = 63‚čÖ2=6.
